recovery_entry: Invoke frozen V4-C only when strict_trigger is true.
recovery_exit: Historical V4-C executes its selected first control and exits after that step.
retrigger: Recompute strict H3 after every state update; permit a new activation only if the strict expression is again true.
fallback: Frozen V4-C highest-min-h candidate when no candidate satisfies dt_margin; log recovery_failed.
